title: Circle Wins Final OCC Approval for National Trust Bank
dek: Circle, the second-largest stablecoin issuer, has received final approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency to open a national trust bank. The move brings its roughly $73 billion USDC operation toward a unified national framework. The approval was corroborated by multiple major outlets.
author: The Crypto Cronkite desk
key_fact: Circle received final OCC approval to open a national trust bank, affecting an estimated $73B in USDC.
body: Circle, the issuer behind USDC, has received final approval from the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) to open a national trust bank, according to multiple major outlets.
The charter moves the company's roughly $73 billion USDC operation toward a unified national framework. Circle is the second-largest stablecoin issuer.
The approval was independently reported by The Block, The Defiant, and Bitcoin Magazine.
